data.name: Dickie A Cumming: The Prequel (Part I)
data.detailed_description:
From the author who brought you the critically acclaimed paperback book, "Dear Celebrity", comes an altogether different beast as he turns his talents toward the digital medium of visual novel...

Snowflake Warning


If you are easily offended, please be advised this is not the game for you. It is widely anticipated to become the most controversial game on Steam!

Overview


In this star-studded third-person interactive visual novel, you play Dickie A. Cumming; a decorated war hero who has recently been discharged from the British army. As Dickie, you must come to terms with a new life on 'civi street' and a brave new world of 'wokeness', 'social justice warriors' and 'cancel culture'.

But Dickie is rather an old-fashioned chap who will struggle to understand these new concepts. As he naively grapples with this new era and the challenges it presents, Dickie inevitably comes into conflict and encounters hostile resistance. And, as if things weren't complicated enough, he finds himself afflicted with a severe sex addiction!



This is an erotic comedy that refuses to take itself (or the craziness of modern Western culture) too seriously! It represents the author's (often flawed) attempts to understand what is a rapidly changing political and societal landscape.

Features

  • Real influence - your decisions will truly influence the story. Up to four choices may be presented in a typical scene and each may lead to a new branch of the story.
  • Dynamic and animated scenes - many scenes feature moving images, special effects and animations.
  • 3D Sex - most of the many sex scenes are presented in 3D and animated (with audio).
  • Multiple endings - depending on the pathways you choose, you will end up with one of many possible conclusions!

data.short_description: Anti-woke pornographic visual novel where your choices matter! This animated 'choose your own adventure' uses animation, audio effects, visuals, voice and text. Scenes present up to four choices, each opening a unique branch. This is how visual novel meets open-world like never before seen!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“You didn't even use my real face! If you had asked, I could have provided you with a mugshot! However, I know it was done with great affection so I forgive you. I hope you don't mind, I skipped the sexy scenes (for the sake of my old heart). I saw enough to know this is a brilliantly funny and subversive thing you've created. I hope it does well. All the best. A”
Sir Anthony Hopkins

“The old thing about me crashing planes is quite hackneyed, but I gotta admit, the way you did was different and it made me laugh.”
Harrison Ford

“Looks like a blast! At first I thought it was just porn trash then it went deep and dark. Wow! I got to say, I got a bad feeling about Bob (De Niro), though. I don't think he wants to work on any more after this one. You said it is your last anyway so...”
Al Pacino

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel CORE i3-3200 or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT730 or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
